'''masate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wakefully|wakefully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wakefully|wakefully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| masate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:masate|masate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:masatesher|masatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masatesherĂ«m|masatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:masatero|masatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:masateshĂ«|masateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masateshĂ«m|masateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimasatero|gokimasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimasateshĂ«|gokimasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasateshĂ«m|gokimasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomasankerom|gomasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomasankeshĂ«|gomasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomasankeshĂ«m|gomasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomasankeya|gomasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:masaterom|masaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masatemu|masatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:masateya|masateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimasaterom|gokimasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasatemu|gokimasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimasateya|gokimasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:masasate|masasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:masasatesher|masasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masasatesherĂ«m|masasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:masasatero|masasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:masasateshĂ«|masasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masasateshĂ«m|masasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimasasatero|gokimasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimasasateshĂ«|gokimasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasasateshĂ«m|gokimasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomasasankerom|gomasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomasasankeshĂ«|gomasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomasasankeshĂ«m|gomasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomasasankeya|gomasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:masasaterom|masasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:masasatemu|masasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:masasateya|masasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimasasaterom|gokimasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimasasatemu|gokimasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimasasateya|gokimasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠte|mĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠtesher|mĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠtero|mĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠsĂŠtero|gokimĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠterom|mĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠtemu|mĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠsĂŠteya|mĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠsĂŠterom|gokimĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠsĂŠteya|gokimĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafsafte|mafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafsaftesher|mafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafsaftesherĂ«m|mafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafsaftero|mafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafsafteshĂ«|mafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafsafteshĂ«m|mafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafsaftero|gokimafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafsafteshĂ«|gokimafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafsafteshĂ«m|gokimafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafsafnkerom|gomafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafsafnkeshĂ«|gomafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafsafnkeshĂ«m|gomafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafsafnkeya|gomafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafsafterom|mafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafsaftemu|mafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafsafteya|mafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafsafterom|gokimafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafsaftemu|gokimafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafsafteya|gokimafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
